meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Fix Debugging Issues
content.seo_description: Master the Antigravity project template to eliminate debugging bottlenecks. A high-level guide for freelancers using Claude Code to ship faster.
content.answer_block: Stop chasing ghost bugs in legacy codebases. By deploying the Antigravity project template, you establish a standardized, LLM-friendly architecture that allows Claude Code to map dependencies and isolate errors instantly. This systematic approach transforms unpredictable debugging sessions into a repeatable, automated workflow for high-velocity freelance development.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: it’s 2 AM, the client is breathing down your neck, and you’re trapped in a recursive loop of 'fix one bug, break two more.' Your codebase has become a house of cards, and manual debugging has become the primary bottleneck in your freelance business. You aren't just writing code; you're fighting entropy.

But what if you could treat your architecture as a deterministic system? The Antigravity project template isn't just a boilerplate; it's a structural reset button. By enforcing strict modularity and context-aware file naming, you turn your project into an open book for AI agents like Claude Code, allowing you to resolve complex regressions in seconds rather than hours.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root directory structure that optimizes for semantic search and AI context retrieval.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new modular TypeScript project using the Antigravity template, ensuring strict separation of concerns between domain logic and infrastructure.

steps.title: Map the Dependency Graph
steps.description: Generate an architectural map that allows Claude Code to understand the blast radius of your changes.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory and generate a dependency map. Identify any circular references or tight coupling that could impede automated debugging.

steps.title: Automated Error Isolation
steps.description: Use the template's standardized logging hooks to feed actionable data to your AI agent.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the Antigravity error boundary to stream stack traces into a local 'debug.json' file formatted specifically for Claude's ingestion.

steps.title: Heuristic Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Leverage the template's context-awareness to pinpoint the exact line of failure.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Using the latest entry in debug.json, identify the root cause of the current regression. Propose a patch that maintains the Antigravity structural integrity.

steps.title: Regression Verification
steps.description: Run automated unit tests generated by the template to ensure the fix doesn't introduce side effects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run the suite of integration tests defined in the Antigravity template. Verify that the recent patch passes all domain-specific logic checks.

pro_tips: Always use the --context-window-limit flag in Claude Code to prevent the AI from hallucinating on massive, legacy monolithic files.
Inject your API documentation into the /docs folder of the Antigravity template to force Claude to reference your own internal 'source of truth'.
Use 'Git-Hooks' to automatically trigger a lint-fix command every time a new bug report is generated in the Antigravity log.
Name your logic modules using Verb-Noun syntax (e.g., ProcessPayment.ts) to maximize Claude's semantic understanding of your intent.
Never commit the 'debug.json' file; add it to your .gitignore immediately to prevent polluting your repository with transient error logs.
content.next_steps: Once your debug loop is automated, focus on building custom CLI scripts to automate your deployment pipeline. The goal is to move from 'debugging' to 'feature shipping' as your primary daily activity.
content.conversion_block: Stop wasting hours on manual debugging and start shipping at the speed of thought. Your clients are waiting for a professional, scalable result. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
